description_long: This is a Nissin-branded instant ramen cup with a predominantly yellow and brown color scheme, featuring bold Japanese text and product imagery on the exterior. The cup is made of lightweight, disposable material, likely paper or plastic, with a sealed foil lid that displays a close-up image of the prepared ramen and beef curry. The cylindrical container tapers slightly towards the base, and the lid is tightly fitted, with printed instructions and branding visible on the top and sides. The surface is glossy and smooth, with clear, high-contrast graphics and a few small icons and labels. The object is compact and portable, designed for single-serving use, and is commonly found in convenience stores or urban food settings. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and visually appealing, with a focus on convenience and instant preparation.
description: A Nissin instant ramen cup with a yellow and brown design, featuring Japanese branding and a sealed foil lid with food imagery. The container is compact, glossy, and designed for single-use convenience.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main Nissin logo, bold Japanese text, and a large yellow label with product information.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting a red kettle icon, additional Japanese text, and a partial view of the lid's food imagery.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying preparation instructions, nutritional information, and more detailed text in Japanese.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with further product details, a white label with Japanese writing, and barcode area.
attribute_bowl_design: The bowl is a tapered cylindrical cup made of glossy paper or plastic, with a wide, flat rim and a tightly sealed foil lid. Its exterior is decorated with bold yellow and brown graphics, Japanese text, and product branding, giving it a modern and eye-catching appearance. The design is clean, with no ornate patterns, focusing on clear labeling and visual appeal.
attribute_topping_arrangement: The lid features a photographic image of the ramen with toppings such as beef and vegetables arranged in a clustered, appetizing manner near the center. The toppings appear to be grouped together, creating a visually rich and inviting presentation typical of instant ramen packaging.
attribute_noodle_visibility: Noodles are not directly visible through the packaging; only the printed image on the lid shows them partially exposed beneath the toppings. In the depicted image, noodles are mostly submerged under the broth and toppings.
attribute_broth_clarity: The broth, as shown in the lid image, appears opaque and richly colored, suggesting a thick, curry-style soup. There are visible floating particles and oil, indicating a hearty and flavorful broth.
attribute_utensil_presence: No utensils such as chopsticks, spoons, or forks are present in or around the bowl in the images.
